member.name: T:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Base.BaseController
member.remarks: Add CancellationToken cancellationToken to action parameters to support request cancellation (e.g. client disconnect). It is bound to by default.

member.name: T:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController
member.summary: Controller for managing user accounts, including registration, login, and role updates.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Data of the currently logged-in user.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.#ctor(SonoTracker.Application.Services.Identity.Account.IAccountService,SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Identity.User.UserDataDto)
member.summary: Controller for managing user accounts, including registration, login, and role updates.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Data of the currently logged-in user.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.RegisterAsync(SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Identity.User.RegisterDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new user with the provided details.
member.param: The registration details of the user.
member.returns: An containing a success message if the registration is successful, or a conflict response if the registration fails.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.LoginAsync(SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Identity.User.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and generates an access token and refresh token.
member.param: The login request containing the user's email and password.
member.returns: An containing a if the login is successful, or an unauthorized response if the login fails.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.Logout(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Logs out the user with the specified user ID.
member.returns: An IActionResult indicating the result of the logout operation.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.RefreshTokenAsync(SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Identity.User.RefreshTokenRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refreshes the access token and refresh token for the user.
member.param: The refresh token request containing user ID, access token, and refresh token.
member.returns: An containing a if successful, or an unauthorized response if the refresh operation fails.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.AccessTokenData
member.summary: Retrieves the data of the currently logged-in user from the access token.
member.returns: An containing the of the logged-in user.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.GetUserByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a user by their unique identifier.
member.returns: An containing the object if found, or a not found response if the user does not exist.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.GetAllUsersAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all users in the application.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.GetAllPagedAsync(SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Base.BaseParam{SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Identity.User.FilterUserDto},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of users in the application.
member.returns: An containing a paginated list of users if found, or a not found response if no users exist.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.UpdateUserPersonalData(SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Identity.User.UpdateUserDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the personal data of the currently logged-in user.
member.param: The DTO containing the user's updated personal data.
member.returns: An indicating the result of the update operation. Returns a success message if the update is successful, or a bad request response if the operation fails.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.AccountsController.DelereUser(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a user by their unique identifier.
member.returns: An indicating whether the user was successfully removed.

member.name: T:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController
member.summary: Controller for managing roles in the application.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.RoleManager{SonoBooking.Domain.Entities.Identity.Role},SonoTracker.Application.Services.Identity.Role.IRoleService)
member.summary: Controller for managing roles in the application.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.GetAllRolesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all roles in the application.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.GetPagedRolesAsync(SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Base.BaseParam{SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Identity.Role.FilterRoleDto},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of users in the application.
member.returns: An containing a paginated list of roles if found, or a not found response if no users exist.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.GetRoleByIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a role by its ID.
member.returns: The role with the specified ID, or a not found result if the role does not exist.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.CreateRoleAsync(SonoTracker.Common.DTO.Identity.Role.AddRoleDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new role in the application.
member.param: The role data transfer object containing role details.
member.returns: An ActionResult indicating the result of the role creation operation.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Controllers.V1.Identity.RolesController.DeleteRoleAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a role from the application.
member.returns: An IActionResult indicating the result of the delete operation.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Extensions.ConfigureDependencyExtension.RegisterSignalR(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers SignalR services with custom options.
member.param: The service collection to add SignalR to.

member.name: T:SonoTracker.Api.Extensions.Swagger.Options.SwaggerConfigureOptions
member.remarks: This allows API versioning to define a Swagger document per API version after the service has been resolved from the service container.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Extensions.Swagger.Options.SwaggerConfigureOptions.#ctor(Asp.Versioning.ApiExplorer.IApiVersionDescriptionProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The provider used to generate Swagger documents.

member.name: T:SonoTracker.Api.Seed.DatabaseSeed
member.summary: Runs all database seed operations on startup.

member.name: M:SonoTracker.Api.Seed.DatabaseSeed.SeedIdentityAsync(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHost)
member.summary: Seed base role (SuperAdmin) and super user on startup.
